innovation_direction: dual-channel split-point search on feedback-vs-SCD axis

dataset.constraint_note: Use exactly the same fixed noisy dataset/noise strength/seed as Round65 mainline

round65c_candidates.name: r65c_split_gap_m24
round65c_candidates.description: 1D split-point sweep on the dual-channel axis with fixed average floor 0.755; gap=-0.24 -> feedback_floor=0.635, scd_floor=0.875.
round65c_candidates.rationale: Hold the dual-channel skeleton fixed and search only the feedback-vs-SCD floor separation, so the optimum really answers where the split point should sit on this mechanism axis.
